name: voice-pr
description: Speak feedback at your own GitHub PR; an agent transcribes it, makes the confident changes in an isolated worktree, pushes commits, and posts anchored intent-trail comments. Ready to review in a few minutes.

scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check public/app.js && node --check extension/anchors.js && node --check extension/content.js && node --check extension/background.js && node --check lib/archive.js && node --check lib/exec.js && node --check lib/github.js && node --check lib/orchestrator.js && node --check lib/pipeline.js && node --check lib/prompt.js && node --check lib/transcribe.js && npm test
